project.name: PROOFD
project.description: PoW-Backed AI Agent Identity Network — gives every AI agent a provably scarce, unforgeable, on-chain identity using HACD as the identity container.

layers.name: PROOFD Passport
layers.description: AI agent on-chain identity document. One per HACD lot. Non-transferable while stacked.

layers.name: PROOFD Utility Token
layers.description: Fungible utility token for registry access, reputation staking, and governance.

phases.description: 50 HACD lots reserved for founding AI agent projects. Apply via hacd.it/incubator partner form.
450 HACD lots open to all at hacd.it/launchpad, first-come-first-served.

distribution.note: All PRF enters circulation exclusively through Stack formation. No pre-mine.

risk_disclosures: PRF is a utility token, not a security or financial instrument.
The on-chain formation reference (50 HAC per HACD) is not a guaranteed price floor or redemption value. Use the term 'formation reference' only.
Registry SDK and cross-chain verification are roadmap items and may be delayed or not delivered.
HACD Labs does not endorse or guarantee any utility claims made by the PROOFD team.
Removing the stack permanently destroys the PROOFD Passport SFT. This action is irreversible.
HAC price is volatile. The USD equivalent of the 50 HAC stack cost will fluctuate.
items_needs_confirmation: PRF utility token distribution allocation at launch vs. roadmap (team to confirm)
Agent metadata JSON schema (off-chain standard, to be finalised before launch)
Exact launch dates for partner batch and public batch
List of 50 partner founding AI agent projects for Launchpad page

validator_checks.ticker_uniqueness: PASS — PRF not found in Launchpad index at time of generation
